title: Compact Utilities
description: Makes items smaller in first person.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76a973c4e4834bc336dcaf35efe2854abcd25711.png)

This resource pack _subtly_ reduces item size while maintaining the authentic vanilla Minecraft aesthetic. Designed for players who want a cleaner visual experience without changing the game’s original style or feel!

**Subscribe to my YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/@OasisSucksAtMc?sub_confirmation=1
